name: Grilled Glazed Tuna Steaks
recipeIngredient: 1 pound Tuna Steaks Cut Into 4 Pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the dry sherry, minced gingerroot, low sodium soy sauce, honey, and garlic in a 1 cup glass measure.
2. Microwave uncovered at high until the mixture boils, about 1 minute.
3. Cool slightly.
4. Place tuna in an 11 x 7 x 1 1/2 inch baking dish. Pour the marinade over the tuna. Cover and chill for 2 hours.
5. Remove the tuna from the marinade, reserving the marinade.
6. Preheat a 10-inch browning skillet at high until hot, about 8 minutes.
7. Arrange the tuna on the hot browning skillet with the thickest portions facing outward.
8. Microwave uncovered at high for 2 minutes.
9. Turn the steaks over and baste with the marinade. Microwave at high for 1 to 2 additional minutes.
10. Let stand covered for 2 minutes before serving immediately with warm marinade. (May also grill outdoors.)
